issues.detail: Skill lacks coverage of error handling and edge cases for API interactions and content creation.

scenarios.name: Publish a 5-image carousel to an Instagram Business account via the Graph API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the documented two-step container/publish flow — POST /{ig-account-id}/media with is_carousel_item:true for each image, then a CAROUSEL container with children:[...mediaIds], then POST /media_publish with creation_id; baseline conflates carousels into a single multipart upload or invents endpoints.

scenarios.name: Plan a 2-week Reels-first content strategy for a small fitness coach account
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the documented 40/30/20/10 content mix, posts 9:16 Reels with hooks in the first 1-2s and mandatory captions/subtitles, uses 4:5 carousels with a slide-1 hook and CTA last slide, and recommends 5-15 hashtags (niche/medium/broad split); baseline gives a generic 'post 3x a week with hashtags' plan.
